title: buildah allowed to use additional storage mounted from host
body:
These fixes will allow us to demonstrate multiple different ways of running the
container builds.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, but could you change your commit message from "buildah" to "buildahimage"?

:hourglass: Testing commit be7a2d6 with merge ce3a120...
@rhatdan two of the homu tests flaked, I've restarted.

@rhatdan not sure what's up, but two of the homu tests are failing with 
```
$ git checkout -qf ce3a1202bd4254cc1be4cf387a9446dc94fa51e0
fatal: reference is not a tree: ce3a1202bd4254cc1be4cf387a9446dc94fa51e0
The command "git checkout -qf ce3a1202bd4254cc1be4cf387a9446dc94fa51e0" failed and exited with 128 during .
```
This looks like the one error caused by planetary positions letting homu's git go crazy. I think, @rhatdan needs to repush to change the commit ID :see_no_evil:
